explanation: The response correctly identifies the memory-bound bottleneck with HIGH confidence, cites specific metric values (0.25 FLOP/byte arithmetic intensity, 98% DRAM utilization, ridge point of 62 FLOP/byte) and concrete code patterns (1 FLOP per 4 bytes, grid-stride loop, 256 MB data), and correctly attributes the bottleneck to low arithmetic intensity and DRAM bandwidth saturation rather than the misleading long scoreboard stall signal.
